title: bouteloua johnstonii
intro: Bouteloua johnstonii, also known as blue grama grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Bouteloua johnstonii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and provide antioxidant properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Bouteloua johnstonii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
